blocked_on: Scripted pick: cube NOW GETS LIFTED (z=0.153) after applying Isaac Lab gear_assembly reference config. Remaining issue is scripted trajectory design: cube gets knocked during close then dropped during transport. Gripper physics is now correct; scripted demo needs redesign.
notes: Critical breakthrough found in this session: Isaac Lab's UR10e2F85GearAssemblyEnvCfg at isaaclab_tasks/manager_based/manipulation/deploy/gear_assembly/config/ur_10e/joint_pos_env_cfg.py provides the working 2F-85 config. Applied: gripper_finger stiffness 0.2->10 (50x), gripper_drive 40/1/10, disable_gravity=True on robot, contact_offset=0.005, drive_type=force on gripper joints. NVIDIA tutorial values (37.52/0.00125/1000 + mimic natFreq 2500) explored but don't work with our URDF-derived asset — gear_assembly values are what transfer.
